columns.name: GCPResource
columns.description: The monitored resource associated with the metric (e.g., VM instance, GKE cluster), includes resource type and labels

columns.name: _IsBillable
columns.description: Specifies whether ingesting the data is billable. When _IsBillable isfalseingestion isn't billed to your Azure account

columns.name: MetricKind
columns.description: The type of metric: GAUGE (instant value), DELTA (change over time), or CUMULATIVE (accumulated value)

columns.name: MetricLabels
columns.description: Key-value pairs that identify the characteristics of the metric (e.g., instance ID, region, etc.)

columns.name: MetricType
columns.description: The full path of the metric type being monitored (e.g., 'compute.googleapis.com/instance/cpu/utilization')

columns.name: Points
columns.description: A list of time series data points that contain values and timestamps for the metric

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: The type of agent the event was collected by. For example,OpsManagerfor Windows agent, either direct connect or Operations Manager,Linuxfor all Linux agents, orAzurefor Azure Diagnostics

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The timestamp when the metric or log entry was generated at the source, representing the actual occurrence time of the data point.

columns.name: ValueType
columns.description: The type of value recorded: INT64, DOUBLE, BOOL, STRING, or DISTRIBUTION
